CALGARY NEW HOME BUILDER CAREER OPPORTUNITIES
Build a Better Career at Baywest

Baywest seeks experienced professionals across many specialized skillsets to fulfill a variety of roles essential to designing, building and marketing our distinct brand of crafted and curated homes.

We are a values-led, collaborative organization with a reputation as a friendly, knowledgeable, honest, and professional team. Many of our people have grown within the company over the long term, and our entire team strives every day go above and beyond expectations for our homeowners.

I love being part of a wonderful team of people who are dedicated to delivering an exceptional home and a great customer experience.
GRAHAM DREDGE, AREA SALES MANAGER

Baywest offers a competitive salary and benefits package within a vibrant, collaborative work environment that encourages personal and professional growth. We welcome resumes, including a cover letter outlining the reasons you feel you are a good fit for the Baywest team, via email to careers@baywesthomes.

Current openings will also be posted on this page – check back often!

Career Postings
Construction Supervisor
JOB DESCRIPTION
Are you motivated by the opportunity to bring new homes to life while leading teams on-site and ensuring every detail meets the highest standards? Bayw
